prompt: A white Toyota HiLux ute with a sophisticated partial vehicle wrap featuring a circular badge emblem on the front doors. The badge has a thin outer ring and thicker inner ring forming a double-circle seal, with a bold LK monogram centered inside. DESIGN AND BUILD curves along the bottom arc, ADELAIDE along the top arc. The badge is rendered in charcoal (#2C2C2C) and gold (#C9A96E) on the white door. The rear quarter panel shows 0481 742 026 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au in charcoal text. The wrap uses a charcoal, white, and gold color scheme, classic and authoritative. The ute is parked on an Adelaide suburban street with eucalyptus trees and neat houses. Bright daylight, professional vehicle photography.
negative_prompt: full wrap, busy graphics, neon colors, cheap vinyl, bubbles in wrap, dirty vehicle, ugly background, industrial area, nighttime, cartoon, illustration, low quality, wax seal

settings.depth_of_field: medium, vehicle sharp, background slightly soft
